c74object.name: dk.classifierdisplay
c74object.description: The dk.classifierdisplay object lets you visualize what classes have been matched by any of the class matching objects. It automatically adapts to the dump outlet of dk.classmatch or it can be preset with Sensory Percussion or any arbitrary labels.
c74object.discussion: If you want to learn more about the classes used in the Sensory Percussion hardware have a look at their user guide here https://help.sunhou.se/v2/software-overview/hardware-panel/hardware-inputs/drum-training/

inlet.description: An incoming class (as name, index, or normalized float) will flash on the UI. Also takes the dump outlet of class matching objects to set the class labels.

outlet.description: Passes the incoming class directly out as well as outputting mouse clicks on the UI.

attribute.name: defaultdisplay
attribute.description:
Sets the default for the UI display
Available options are spsnare, sptom, and spkick, but you can also input an arbitrary list of class names.

attribute.name: offcolor
attribute.digest: RGB values for the background color
attribute.description: RGB values for the background color as floats between 0. and 1.

attribute.name: oncolor
attribute.digest: RGB values for the flashing color
attribute.description: RGB values for the flashing color as floats between 0. and 1.

attribute.name: size
attribute.description: Display size of UI (small: 169, medium: 235, large: 350).
